response.justification: Candidate has 16+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, backend, embedded, and high-throughput systems (Sociomantic handled millions of HTTP requests/second), with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Naver. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis — all central to this Principal-level growth/experimentation role. Title progression (Senior/Staff) and scope of impact also fall short of the IC6/Principal bar for systemic, cross-org platform leadership.
strengths: 16+ years of polyglot engineering experience spanning required languages (JS/TS, Java, C/C++, C#)
Production experience with high-throughput, low-latency systems (Sociomantic data integration)
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring via workshops/talks)
concerns: No demonstrated experience building or operating experimentation/feature-flagging platforms
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure work or statistical/experimental analysis aptitude
Scope and leadership signal appears below IC6/Principal — no clear multi-team platform ownership or cross-org influence at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot fundamentals and high-scale production experience
